cases.prompt: Take this approved mockup and turn it into production HTML.

assertions.text: Output reflows text, computes heights, and uses dynamic layouts rather than fixed mockups
Produces self-contained output with low overhead (~30KB) and zero dependencies

cases.prompt: 이 디자인 확정됐어. 이제 실제 페이지로 만들어줘.

assertions.text: Finalizes an approved design into real, working HTML/CSS
Picks the right Pretext patterns for the given design type via smart API routing
